# CWE-272 — Least Privilege Violation (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-272-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: keeps elevated uid for the entire handler after chown.
func FixOwnership(c *gin.Context) {
	_ = syscall.Setuid(0)
	path := c.Query("file")
	_ = os.Chown(path, 1000, 1000)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"updated": path})
}
